name: FctsCaseMgtContactExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_CMCS_CONTACT AS (SELECT DISTINCT CMCM_ID, CMCT_SEQ_NO, CMCT_FIRST_NAME, CMCT_LAST_NAME, CMCT_MID_INIT, CMCT_TITLE, CMCT_ADDR1, CMCT_ADDR2, CMCT_ADDR3, CMCT_CITY, CMCT_ZIP, CMCT_COUNTY, CMCT_FAX, CMCT_FAX_EXT, CMCT_PHONE, CMCT_PHONE_EXT, CMCT_EMAIL, CMCT_CTRY_CD, CMCT_STATE, CMCT_MCTR_LANG FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_FacetsOwner}.CMC_CMCT_CONTACT), cte_StripField AS (SELECT STRIP.FIELD.EE(CMCM_ID) + ';' + CAST(CMCT_SEQ_NO AS VARCHAR(10)) + ';' + dbo.trim_default(@{pipeline().parameters.SrcSysCd}) AS PRI_NAT_KEY_STRING, @{pipeline().parameters.RunIDTimeStamp} AS FIRST_RECYC_TS, CMCT_SEQ_NO AS CNTCT_SEQ_NO, STRIP.FIELD.EE(CMCM_ID) AS CASE_MGT_ID, dbo.trim_default(@{pipeline().parameters.SrcSysCd}) AS SRC_SYS_CD, dbo.trim_default(CMCT_FIRST_NAME) AS CNTCT_FIRST_NM, dbo.trim_default(CMCT_LAST_NAME) AS CNTCT_LAST_NM, dbo.trim_default(CMCT_MID_INIT) AS CNTCT_MIDINIT, dbo.trim_default(CMCT_TITLE) AS CNTCT_TTL_NM, dbo.trim_default(CMCT_ADDR1) AS CNTCT_ADDR_LN_1, dbo.trim_default(CMCT_ADDR2) AS CNTCT_ADDR_LN_2, dbo.trim_default(CMCT_ADDR3) AS CNTCT_ADDR_LN_3, dbo.trim_default(CMCT_CITY) AS CMCT_CITY, dbo.trim_default(CMCT_ZIP) AS CMCT_ZIP, dbo.trim_default(CMCT_COUNTY) AS CNTCT_CNTY_NM, dbo.trim_default(CMCT_FAX) AS CNTCT_FAX_NO, dbo.trim_default(CMCT_FAX_EXT) AS CNTCT_FAX_EXT_NO, dbo.trim_default(CMCT_PHONE) AS CNTCT_PHN_NO, dbo.trim_default(CMCT_PHONE_EXT) AS CNTCT_PHN_EXT_NO, dbo.trim_default(CMCT_EMAIL) AS CNTCT_EMAIL_ADDR, CASE WHEN LTRIM(RTRIM(CMCT_CTRY_CD)) IN ('USA','US') THEN 'USA' ELSE 'NA' END AS CMCT_CTRY_CD, dbo.trim_default(CMCT_STATE) AS CMCT_STATE, dbo.trim_default(CMCT_MCTR_LANG) AS CMCT_MCTR_LANG FROM cte_CMCS_CONTACT) SELECT * FROM cte_StripField

Description:
Called By: FctsMedMgtCntl


Process : Extract Case Mgt Status data from Facets to DataSet which is processed and loaded to CASE_MGT_CNTCT table
